title: Workflow Discovery in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger workflow discovery in practice judgment so ai / automation work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Workflow Discovery in Practice is a leverage point inside ai / automation. It supports the broader goal of workflow automation, copilots, agentic systems, and leverage through tooling.
coreConcepts: Workflow Discovery in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good workflow discovery in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Workflow Discovery in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
